MLModelDriftDetected.runbook: Check feature distribution, compare training-serving skew, review recent data pipeline changes.

MLInferenceHighP99Latency.runbook: Check pod CPU/memory, HPA status, GKE node pressure, and recent rollout history.

MLInferenceHighErrorRate.runbook: Check application logs, dependency errors, model load failures, and rollback candidates.

MLPredictionDataQualityIssue.runbook: Check upstream schema changes, null rates, invalid categorical values, and batch freshness.
